mapper.select:
SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, EQUIPMENT_CD AS equipmentCd, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, EVENT_STATUS AS eventStatus, TARGET_TYPE AS targetType, TARGET_ID AS targetId, LOCATION_CD AS locationCd, ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, EVENT_MESSAGE AS eventMessage, RAW_PAYLOAD AS rawPayload, EVENT_DTM AS eventDtm, PROCESSED_YN AS processedYn, PROCESS_RESULT AS processResult, PROCESS_MESSAGE AS processMessage, PROCESSED_DTM AS processedDtm, REG_USER_ID AS regUserId, REG_DTM AS regDtm FROM MCS_PLC_EVENT_LOG
ORDER BY EVENT_DTM DESC, EVENT_ID DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_PLC_EVENT_LOG ( EVENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_CD, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_STATUS, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, LOCATION_CD, ERROR_CODE, EVENT_MESSAGE, RAW_PAYLOAD, EVENT_DTM, PROCESSED_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{equipmentCd}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{locationCd}, #{errorCode}, #{eventMessage}, #{rawPayload}, #{eventDtm}, 'N', #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_PLC_EVENT_LOG SET PROCESSED_YN = 'Y', PROCESS_RESULT = #{processResult}, PROCESS_MESSAGE = #{processMessage}, PROCESSED_DTM = NOW() WHERE EVENT_ID = #{eventId}
